scripts.android:dev: sh -c 'JAVA_HOME="${JAVA_HOME:-/Applications/Android Studio.app/Contents/jbr/Contents/Home}"; CAP_SERVER_URL="${CAP_SERVER_URL:-http://localhost:3000}"; export JAVA_HOME CAP_SERVER_URL; npm run android:reverse && TARGET_ARGS=$(node ./scripts/android-target.mjs) && npx cap sync android && npx cap run android --no-sync $TARGET_ARGS'
scripts.android:build: sh -c 'JAVA_HOME="${JAVA_HOME:-/Applications/Android Studio.app/Contents/jbr/Contents/Home}"; export JAVA_HOME; npm run android:sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug'
scripts.android:build:release: sh -c 'JAVA_HOME="${JAVA_HOME:-/Applications/Android Studio.app/Contents/jbr/Contents/Home}"; export JAVA_HOME; npm run android:sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease'
scripts.android:install: sh -c 'JAVA_HOME="${JAVA_HOME:-/Applications/Android Studio.app/Contents/jbr/Contents/Home}"; export JAVA_HOME; npm run android:reverse && npm run android:sync && cd android && ./gradlew installDebug'
scripts.android:emulator:start: sh -c 'JAVA_HOME="${JAVA_HOME:-/Applications/Android Studio.app/Contents/jbr/Contents/Home}"; ANDROID_SDK_ROOT="${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT:-$HOME/Library/Android/sdk}"; export JAVA_HOME ANDROID_SDK_ROOT; "$ANDROID_SDK_ROOT/emulator/emulator" -avd Medium_Tablet'
scripts.android:launch: sh -c 'ANDROID_SDK_ROOT="${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT:-$HOME/Library/Android/sdk}"; export ANDROID_SDK_ROOT; "$ANDROID_SDK_ROOT/platform-tools/adb" shell am start -n com.informeer.app/.MainActivity'
